race.comment: SPIV (1) went to the lead in a new role last start and kept finding to record a tough maiden win over 1400m at Newcastle in heavy going. Bred to want more ground so the extra trip today comes at the right time. Capable of taking this next step. FLYING GREY (4) came from last on the bend to get up for fourth when second-up over this trip at Hawkesbury last time out. Will appreciate a track with less give today and at the third run back she should be near her peak. Likely leader CHA CHA CHA (7) is rarely far away but must be some risk this time as she hasn't raced for six weeks. Exotics only. OMAHA SAND (5) not firing at all recently, the latest effort an eighth over 1600m at Newcastle on May 19. Fitter and in a suitable race.
